chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1670 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of MA 6169/19 2. For hearing of main case 16.08.2019. Ms. Ambreen Siyal, Advocate for petitioners along with petitioners. Mr. Farhad Abro, Advocate for respondent No.5 along with respondent No.5. Ms. Rameshan Oad, A.P.G. -.-.-. Learned Counsel submits that the F.I.R. against the petitioners has already been disposed of by the Investigating Officer under “C” Class which has been endorsed by the learned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate, Pithoro vide order dated 16.07.2019, however, petitioners are apprehending danger to their life at the hands of family of petitioner No.1. Petitioner No.1 is present in court and has reiterated the factum of her marriage with petitioner No.2 and that she has embraced Islam out of her own freewill and choice after understanding its teachings. In view of above, this petition is disposed of along with listed application with direction to police officials to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
